SHORT NAME: PROVIDER 

LONG NAME: PRVDR_NUM 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 6 

SOURCE: — 

VALUES: The first two positions are the CCN state codes. A state may have more than one code. The following is 
a list of all CMS assigned state codes to be used with the CCN:

00 = Arizona 
01 = Alabama 
02 = Alaska 
03 = Arizona 
04 = Arkansas 
05 = California 
06 = Colorado 
07 = Connecticut 
08 = Delaware 
09 =
